headline: ₹10-50 Cr at risk if trend persists and triggers fund outflows or regulatory action — YES Bank's ESG rating slips marginally to 77, signaling minor governance disclosure concerns
what_matters: Potential for mild P/E compression if further downgrades occur; current revenue/margin impact negligible.
BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no immediate penalty or regulatory deadline.
Slight cost of capital uptick (+20-40bps possible if trend persists); minor risk of passive fund outflow.
